Widget.text:
All Audio Outputs are muted.
Press button for 5 seconds to enable audio

Bluetooth Audio
The reciever (Orange box) must be connected to a marked network socket. Pressing the button on the top called "pair" will disconnect the current device and allow for a new device to be connected. (This only needs to be pressed briefly). You can then connect your device to "Armstrong Lobby" and use it to play back audio. Ensure the volume is turned down on the fader and Select "Lobby Bluetooth" on the source selection. Then raise the fader.

All Audio Outputs are muted.
Press button for 5 seconds to enable audio
Press Help Tab (above). For Bluetooth Instructions

Bluetooth Audio
The reciever is located at the front desk (Orange box) and connected to the audio system. Pressing the button on the top called "pair" will disconnect the current device and allow for a new device to be connected. (This only needs to be pressed briefly). You can then connect your device to "Armstrong Lobby" and use it to play back audio. Ensure the volume is turned down on the fader and Select "Lobby Bluetooth" on the source selection. Then raise the fader.
